nasb.text: Now as Peter was traveling through all those regions, he came down also to the saints who lived at Lydda.

esv.text: Now as Peter went here and there among them all, he came down also to the saints who lived at Lydda.

cnv.text: 彼得周遊各地的時候，也到了住在呂大的聖徒那裡。

ccb.text: 彼得四处奔波，来到吕大探访那里的信徒，

csbs.text: 有一次，彼得走遍各地的时候，也下到住在利达的圣徒们那里。
